revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''5-3-460

The unwanted transfer of energy transferred from one circuit, called the "disturbing" circuit, to another circuit, called the "disturbed" circuit.

Reference: I.E.C.

{{IALAFooter}}
